critiques.finding: Decompose ui_refs anchor bubble-path ids (ai_RNbBHXeq–ev) while ir/slices/bTHDZ____root.json canonical subtree uses ai_RNbBHXcz and ai_RNbBHXdA–E for the same popup nodes — parity tooling keyed on slice ids will not match DOM markers.
critiques.alternative: Dual-mark critical text/button nodes with both id sets, or normalize decompose ui_refs to slice canonical ids in a follow-up decompose fix.

critiques.finding: Cancel button applies Button_ghost_ and confirm uses Button_primary_/variant cta; slice canonical buttons ai_RNbBHXdD/ai_RNbBHXdE reference Button_outline_ and Button_destructive_ (layout_notes intentionally overrides confirm to primary).
critiques.alternative: Apply Button_outline_ on cancel; keep Button_primary_ on confirm only if layout_notes override is the accepted DS policy, otherwise switch confirm to Button_destructive_.

critiques.finding: Title and warning body use Text_heading_2_ and Text_body_ instead of slice Text_heading_3_ and Text_body_muted_ on canonical text nodes ai_RNbBHXcz/ai_RNbBHXdB.
critiques.alternative: Swap data-style-ref and bubbleStyle calls to Text_heading_3_ and Text_body_muted_ for closer typography parity.

critiques.finding: deleteConversation falls back to profiles.onboarding_data when chatconversation/chatmessage tables are absent (supabase has no chat migrations), so AC-2 message-row deletion is not exercised in the prototype schema path.
critiques.alternative: Land supabase chatconversation/chatmessage migrations so confirm always runs the table delete path; retain onboarding fallback only during rollout.

critiques.finding: Radix Dialog backdrop/overlay lacks Group_overlay_ style_ref marker present in decompose ui_refs.
critiques.alternative: Add data-style-ref Group_overlay_ to DialogOverlay via bubbleStyle token for automated parity checks.
